settings.question: How do I know my order went through?
settings.answer: You get a confirmation email right after checkout. If it did not arrive, check your spam and promotions folders, then reach us with the email you used.

settings.question: Can I change my order after placing it?
settings.answer: If it has not shipped, reach us within 48 hours and we will do our best to update it. Once it ships, it cannot be changed.

settings.question: Can I cancel my order?
settings.answer: Yes, within 48 hours of placing it, as long as it has not shipped yet.

settings.question: Do you restock sold-out pieces?
settings.answer: Core Mountain Collection pieces run permanently. Pieces marked Limited Sale are not restocked once they sell through.

settings.question: I never received my confirmation email.
settings.answer: Check your spam and promotions folders first. If it is still missing, contact us with your name and the email you used and we will confirm your order.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: All methods shown at checkout, including major cards and the express wallets your device supports.

settings.question: What currency are prices in?
settings.answer: All prices are in Canadian Dollars, CAD.

settings.question: Is my payment secure?
settings.answer: Checkout is handled by Shopify and is PCI compliant. We never see or store your full card details.

settings.question: My payment was declined. What now?
settings.answer: Confirm your card details and billing address, then try again. If it keeps failing, use another method or contact your bank.

settings.question: Do you charge tax?
settings.answer: Applicable taxes are calculated and shown at checkout before you pay.

settings.question: How much is shipping?
settings.answer: A flat 20 CAD on orders under 249 CAD. Orders of 249 CAD or more ship free.

settings.question: Where do you ship?
settings.answer: Within Canada only for now.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: About 5 to 7 business days once your order ships.

settings.question: How do I track my order?
settings.answer: You get a tracking link by email the moment your order ships. Allow 1 to 3 business days for it to start updating.

settings.question: What is package protection?
settings.answer: An optional add-on at checkout. If your package is confirmed lost or stolen in transit, we issue a full refund.

settings.question: What is your refund policy?
settings.answer: A monetary refund is issued only when a piece arrives defective. A wrong size or a wrong item is resolved with store credit for the product price.

settings.question: My piece arrived defective.
settings.answer: Contact us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and a photo. You are entitled to a replacement or a monetary refund.

settings.question: I ordered the wrong size.
settings.answer: You receive store credit for the product price, which you can put toward a new piece. Store credit does not include shipping or taxes.

settings.question: How long do refunds take?
settings.answer: Approved monetary refunds are processed around 3 business days after we accept the request.

settings.question: Can I return a Limited Sale piece?
settings.answer: Limited Sale pieces are final sale. The only exception is a wrong size, which is resolved with store credit.

settings.question: How do I reach you?
settings.answer: Use our Contact page. Pick a reason so we can route your message and reply faster.

settings.question: How fast do you respond?
settings.answer: Within 48 hours.

settings.question: Do you have a phone line?
settings.answer: Not yet. The Contact page is the fastest way to reach us and keeps everything in one thread.

settings.question: I have a partnership or affiliate question.
settings.answer: Choose that reason on the Contact page, or visit our Affiliate page to sign in or join.

settings.question: Where are you based?
settings.answer: Calgary, Alberta. Built in Canada.
